implementation_cross_check.notes: Used only to compare variable coverage, timing conventions, model(linear) form, shock names, and implementation scaling. It was not used as paper-side mathematical authority and Dynare was not run.

spans: title, abstract, and introduction at top of Markdown
Section 2 model overview and feature list
Section 2.1 household utility, consumption, labor, wage rigidity, durable services, budget, and adjustment costs
Section 2.2 final goods and transportation production
Section 2.3 intermediate goods production and price adjustment
Sections 2.4-2.5 capital-services and domestic oil production blocks
Section 2.6 monetary-policy rule, Euler equation, and stochastic discount factor
Section 2.7 market-clearing equations and GDP identities
Sections 2.8-2.9 ROW equations and optimal oil/efficiency conditions
Section 3 estimation, shocks, observables, calibrated shares, and steady-state targets

runtime_validation.notes: Current phase is private derivation extraction only. User explicitly requested not to run Dynare.

formula_quality.reason: The paper-side Markdown contains the main structural equations, but some OCR expressions are malformed and the full log-linear implementation equations are not printed as a compact paper-side appendix. Several equations are marked needs_review.

copyright_boundary: The derivation extracts model structure and equations and avoids copying long prose from the paper.
